hero.description: ClawMore monitors your AWS infrastructure, detects issues, and automatically applies fixes — while you sleep.

autonomous.title: Automated Fixes
autonomous.desc: Continuous monitoring detects performance gaps and code issues. AI generates fixes, commits them to your repo, and runs your tests.

neural.title: Event-Driven Architecture
neural.desc: Built on AWS EventBridge for reliable, decoupled processing. Each fix runs as an isolated job with automatic retry on failure.

byoc.title: Your Cloud, Your Control
byoc.desc: Runs entirely in your AWS account. Strict permission boundaries, audit logs, and approval gates keep you in control.

evolution.title: How It Works
evolution.desc: ClawMore runs a continuous improvement loop: scan, plan, fix, verify. Each change is committed to your repo for review.
evolution.logIdentify: Detected slow query in user service
evolution.mutAdded: + Added query index for 3x faster lookups

steps.label: DETECT
steps.desc: Scans logs and metrics for issues

pricing.title: Start Free, Scale When Ready
pricing.subtitle: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

tax.title: How AI Credits Work
tax.desc: Your $10/month credit covers AI-powered code fixes. When you run low, top up with a $10 fuel pack. You only pay for what you use — no hidden fees.

leadForm.betaSuccess: Thank you for applying for managed beta. We'll be in touch shortly.
leadForm.waitlistSuccess: You've successfully joined the waitlist. We'll update you on our progress.
leadForm.betaDesc: Get prioritized access to our fully managed autonomous infrastructure service.
leadForm.waitlistDesc: Be the first to know when we open up new slots for our self-evolving infrastructure engine.
